title: Atlas Mode | Polyglot Dev App
description: Atlas mode reference pages for cross-language concepts, patterns, and workflows.

content.text: Atlas mode is the reference layer of the app. Use the left navigation to jump across design patterns, principles, workflows, and language-specific reference collections.
Pick one or two languages in the selector bar to compare implementation styles side by side while staying on the same concept page.

Use Design Patterns for implementation comparisons, Principles for architecture guidance, Workflow for toolchain and process notes, Keywords for language-specific quick lookup, and Playground Setup for language-specific local environment setup guidance.
